column1: The pulse of the land beats steady and strong.
Infinite stories written in the shifting shadows.
Each breath echoes the wisdom of the elders.
Clouds gather above the meeting place.
Legends wake within the heart of the forest. Stone paths lead us back to the beginning.
We carry the fire passed through generations. Voices unite in the rhythm of the harvest.
Tafalong sea is a vision of beauty. Ancient songs drift across the mountain range. Roots reach down into the sacred earth.
The tongue of the Amis sings deep. We honor the work left by those before. Golden sunlight dancing upon the crest.
Looking upward to the vast open sky. Our river flows through the ancient valley. Walking together on the road of life.
Tafalong is the home of our spirit. The face of the Pangcah shines bright. We remember the tides of our ancestors.
